title: Audit Recommendation
description: Schema for structured recommendations output by audit and read-only skills for auto-issue generation

recommendations.description: List of actionable recommendations from the audit

action.description: Short, actionable title for the recommendation (used as GitHub issue title suffix)

severity.description: Severity level, maps to GitHub issue priority labels

description.description: Detailed description of the problem and what needs to be done

type.description: Category of the recommendation, maps to GitHub issue labels

item_reference.description: Optional reference to the specific item (e.g., '#123', 'path/to/file.ts')

source_skill.description: The audit skill that generated this recommendation (auto-set by audit-create-issues.sh --skill flag)

recommendations.description: Issue #123 'Implement auth flow' has been in-progress for 8 days without update. Stale work blocks sprint progress.

recommendations.action: Triage orphaned issue #456 in closed milestone
recommendations.description: Issue #456 'Fix login bug' is OPEN but milestone 'sprint-1' is CLOSED. Work was missed and needs reassignment.
